mapper.select:
SELECT
MO.MGMT_OFC_NO, MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO, MO.MGMT_OFC_NM, MO.MGMT_OFC_TELNO, MO.USE_YN,
AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM, AC.SIDO_NM, AC.SIGUNGU_NM, AC.EMD_NM, AC.DOROJUSO, AC.UNIT_CNT, AC.DONG_CNT, AC.BLD_YR
FROM MEMBER MB
INNER JOIN MANAGER M ON MB.USER_NO = M.USER_NO
INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON M.MGMT_OFC_NO = MO.MGMT_OFC_NO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO
WHERE MB.USER_ID = #{userId} AND MO.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT
MO.MGMT_OFC_NO, MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO, MO.MGMT_OFC_NM, MO.MGMT_OFC_TELNO, MO.USE_YN,
AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM, AC.SIDO_NM, AC.SIGUNGU_NM, AC.EMD_NM, AC.DOROJUSO, AC.UNIT_CNT, AC.DONG_CNT, AC.BLD_YR
FROM MGMT_OFFICE MO
INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO
WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND MO.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT DISTINCT ac.sido_nm FROM mgmt_office mo INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON mo.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE mo.use_yn = 'Y' AND ac.sido_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ac.sido_nm

SELECT DISTINCT ac.sigungu_nm FROM mgmt_office mo INNER JOIN apt_complex ac ON mo.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no WHERE mo.use_yn = 'Y' AND ac.sido_nm = #{sidoNm} AND ac.sigungu_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ac.sigungu_nm
SELECT MGMT_OFC_NO AS mgmtOfcNo, MGMT_OFC_NM AS mgmtOfcNm, MGMT_OFC_TELNO AS mgmtOfcTelno, APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo FROM MGMT_OFFICE WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
